title: LS2 LS2 FF416 Matte Black

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner

technical_analysis: The LS2 FF416 utilizes a multi-density EPS liner system designed to absorb high-impact energy while maintaining structural integrity during rotational forces. The shell construction employs a carbon fiber composite overmolded onto an ABS core, significantly reducing overall weight without compromising the rigorous safety standards required by ECE 22.06 and DOT regulations. This hybrid approach ensures that the helmet meets modern crash test protocols regarding penetration resistance and impact attenuation.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of style and protection with the LS2 FF416 in a sleek matte black finish. Designed for the discerning rider who demands premium aesthetics without sacrificing safety, this full-face helmet features an aggressive aerodynamic profile that slices through the wind while keeping you cool on long rides. The sophisticated carbon fiber look is complemented by high-quality graphics that make a statement on any track or street.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the LS2 FF416 Matte Black full-face helmet. Features ECE 22.06 certification, lightweight carbon composite shell, and superior ventilation for ultimate riding comfort and safety.
